chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-260 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 18.03.2026. Mr. Mir Murtaza Abro, Advocate for Applicant/accused. Mr. Abid Hussain Chang, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State alongwith ASI / I.O Aqeel Ahmed from PS GOR. ***************************************** At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant/accused submits that he would be satisfied if directions are issued to the learned Trial Court to examine at least two eye-witnesses, after which he intends to file a fresh Bail Application on the basis of the material available on record before the Trial Court. In view of the above submission made by learned counsel for the applicant/accused, learned counsel for the complainant raises no objection. Accordingly, the learned Trial Court is directed to examine two eye/material witnesses within a period of one month and submit such compliance to this Court. The Applicant is at liberty to file a fresh Bail Application before Trial Court on the basis of material collected by the Trial Court. The SSP, Hyderabad, is further directed to ensure the attendance of the said witnesses before the Trial Court. Consequently, the instant Bail Application stands disposed of, alongwith pending application(s), if any. Let a copy of this order be transmitted to the Trial Court and SSP Hyderabad for strict compliance. JUDGE Ali.
